name: Simon Property Group Inc. Simon Property Group 8 3/8% Series J Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Simon Property Group Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns, develops, and manages retail real estate properties, primarily shopping malls, Premium Outlets, and The Mills. The 8 3/8% Series J Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock represents a preferred equity interest in the company. Simon Property Group is headquartered in Indianapolis, Indiana.
